title: Physical-slotmachine
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mlo2ukKmY4U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Fully Customizable Physical Slot Machine Plugin for Minecraft
Discover the ultimate slot machine experience with our Physical Slot Machine Plugin, exclusively designed for Minecraft servers. This plugin transcends the ordinary, offering a fully immersive and customizable gaming experience that can be seamlessly integrated into your server's unique environment. With intuitive config.yml configurations, you have complete control over every detail of your slot machines. Explore the features and customize to your heart's content:

🎰 Slot Machine Essentials
Create Your Machines: Use slotMachines: to define and create slot machines, each with its own name and character, enriching your game world.
Strategic Placement: Precisely position your slot machines and their functional components using world:, betting_button_location:, start_button_location:, and slot_location:.
🧭 Orientation Configuration
Machine Facing Direction: Crucially, direction: determines the orientation of the slot machine itself, not the player's viewpoint. Choose from NORTH, SOUTH, EAST, or WEST to perfectly align with your design.
💵 Betting Flexibility
Dynamic Bet Amounts: Configure a range of bet amounts in betAmounts:. Players can cycle through these with each button press, adding depth to the betting process.
🔄 Game Mechanics and Sound Design
Adjustable Probabilities: Tailor the game's challenge with blockProbabilities:, setting the appearance rates for different blocks.
Custom Sounds: Enhance player interaction with adjustable sound settings for slot machine operations and button clicks in soundSettings:, enriching the game's auditory landscape.
🎉 Rewards and Multipliers
Exciting Multipliers: Set rewarding multipliers for doubles and triples in rewardMultipliers:, and create special combination rewards in the special: section for added thrill.
⚙️ Fine-Tuning and Debugging
Controlled Slot Speed: Fine-tune the pace of slot changes in debugSettings:, ensuring a balanced and engaging gameplay experience.
This plugin is your ticket to an elevated gaming experience on your Minecraft server, providing a level of customization that allows for perfect integration into any setting. Ready to take your server to the next level? Check out the plugin and get started today: Physical Slot Machine Plugin.

Embrace the excitement, customize your gameplay, and watch as your server becomes the go-to destination for Minecraft slot machine enthusiasts!
